title: parentucellia latifolia var. flaviflora
intro: Parentucellia latifolia var. flaviflora, also known as yellow toadshade, is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing respiratory issues and reducing fever, making it a valuable remedy for colds and flu. In terms of herbal preparations, Parentucellia latifolia var. flaviflora can be consumed as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical remedy.
